name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
Crypto Watcher — personal watchlists and price alerts.

• Add Coin — put a ticker on your watchlist
• Manage Alerts — threshold or percent-move rules
• Set Quiet Hours — pause alerts overnight
• Morning Summary — opt-in daily digest
• /price BTC — live price, or /price for your whole list

Tap /start for the menu. Not financial advice.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
